content: OPEC+ extended voluntary production cuts of 2.2 million barrels per day through Q2 2025, supporting Brent crude above $80/barrel. Saudi Arabia committed to additional 1 million bpd cuts beyond quota. However, non-OPEC supply growth from US shale, Guyana, and Brazil offset approximately 60% of these cuts. Global oil inventories remained near five-year averages as of January 2025.
